task_updates.executor_notes: Added `scripts/capacity_reconciler_audit.sql` with operator queries for shadow intended actions, pool summary intents, shadow observer dedupe, authoritative one-row-per-pool-cycle invariant, route backoff windows, shadow-vs-legacy worker mutation comparison, and current leases. Extended `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/scripts/debug.py` help text for capacity-intent auditing. Extended `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/scripts/debug/commands/scaling_audit.py` to query `worker_capacity_intents`, `worker_capacity_route_backoffs`, and `orchestrator_leases`; report pool intent stability, shadow observer duplicate observations, authoritative duplicate cycles, route backoff windows, route-demand fallback rows, lease suppressions, latest adoption intents, divergence counts, and legacy worker mutation counts alongside existing churn/effective-utilization output. JSON output now includes a `capacity_reconciler` section. Verification: app debug files compile, `debug.py --help` advertises capacity intents, and rg verified the committed SQL/debug surfaces reference the required tables and metadata fields.

Added `tests/control/test_capacity_reconciler.py` as a focused runtime-safety suite covering queued-zero incident replay/no cancel, route-scoped backoff exact 30/60/120/240 second delays plus reset on successful spawn, pool-floor sentinel uniqueness for nullable route keys, pool bounds applied once across multiple routes, wall-clock and `valid_until` cancel hysteresis, route-stale and excluded-worker effective-capacity exclusion, authoritative lease/record-before-act/exact-one-row/adoption behavior, lease rejection suppression, shadow no-side-effects with observer/observation dedupe identifiers, spawn idempotency, CycleSummary counter folding, and cancel terminal marking despite failed RunPod termination. Verification passed for `tests/control/test_capacity_reconciler.py`, full `tests/gpu_orchestrator/control`, control-loop/config/database/migration targeted suites, and scaling/route-stale/route-aware targeted suites. Full suite was run and failed only at the already observed missing `scripts.spot_instance_lifetime_test` import, unrelated to T10.

Yes. The new focused test module covers queued-zero no-cancel replay, route-scoped backoff with exact cooldowns and reset, pool-floor sentinel uniqueness, pool-budget bounds applied once, single-writer lease behavior, adoption, excluded/route-stale workers, idempotency, shadow no-side-effects, record-before-act ordering, cancel terminal marking despite RunPod termination failure, shadow observer dedupe identifiers, and CycleSummary counters.
